metadata.description: Access mesh custom attributes (vertex color, UVs, etc.)

summary: Reads custom mesh attributes (e.g., vertex color, custom data). Unity equivalent uses Vertex Color or Custom Attributes.

unity_implementation.uv_coordinates: UV node → reads Mesh.uv, Mesh.uv2, etc.
unity_implementation.custom_data: Custom Function or Property Block from C#

implementation_approach.step_2: Map to Unity equivalent (VertexColor, UV, etc.)
implementation_approach.step_3: If custom attribute: use Material Property Block from C# script

compatibility_loss_15_percent: Custom attributes not native to ShaderGraph - require C# scripting or predefined inputs
